Issue: How do I reset my HackerRank password?
Subject: Password reset
response: To reset your HackerRank password, go to the login page and click 'Forgot Password'. Enter your registered email and follow the instructions sent to you.
justification: Password reset is a standard FAQ covered in the support corpus.

Issue: I want Claude to stop crawling my website
Subject: Opt out of Claude web crawling
response: You can opt out of Claude crawling your website by adding the appropriate directives to your robots.txt file. Specifically, add: User-agent: ClaudeBot\nDisallow: /
justification: The corpus covers Claude's web crawling opt-out policy.
